title: How to Edit Project Health (RAG) labels in a Portfolio?
excerpt:
Hi, 
How can we edit the Project Health (RAG) labels on a Portfolio ? 
 
I can’t click on the edit button. 
Someone has a solution please? 
Thanks

posts.author: Marsoux (Marsoux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

How can we edit the Project Health (RAG) labels on a Portfolio ?

I can’t click on the edit button.

Someone has a solution please?

posts.author: Bill_Stamos (Bill Stamos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Additional use case:

Provide a RAG status for Completed, this way a

(Yearly) Portfolio can show

x Projects off track,
x Projects at risk,
x Projects on track,
x Projects are completed.
